issue_body:
Create `src/consumer/selector.ts` — currently the consumer connects to one provider. Architecture v0.2 specifies selection by model/latency/capacity.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- New `src/consumer/selector.ts` with selection logic
- Fallback to next provider on error
- Tests in `tests/selector.test.ts`

**Effort:** 3-4h | **Points:** RBOB Genesis Bonus (5x)
issue_comentarii: Resolved by #14 (@Chronolapse411). Points: 2500 (500 base × 5x Genesis). Awaiting rebase for final merge.

fisiere_relevante.motiv: numele fisierului se potriveste cu issue: provider.test.ts
